title: lycopus coreanus var. ramosissimus
intro: Lycopus coreanus var. ramosissimus, also known as Korean water hawthorn or Korean lythrum, is a variant of the Lycopus coreanus plant, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Lycopus coreanus var. ramosissimus is often prepared as a tea or infusion, while the leaves and stems can also be used in tincture or extract form.
